calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Yang, via Zoom, for Sanny Won, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss his request that the court issue this order for the sole purpose of describing the real property as community property. Counsel offers testimony in support of his petition. The court advises that there is no reason for this court to be involved for the purpose characterizing the property and points counsel to probate code 13650.

After brief, additional discussion, the Petition for Spousal Property is Denied.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
